label: Strategy Dashboard Link
description: Create a dashboard deep link for strategy, run, market, or postmortem evidence.

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: Dashboard route for a strategy, market, trial, or live postmortem.

outputs.name: dashboard_url
outputs.description: Human-auditable link to strategy charts, order lifecycle, or comparison views.

failureModes.description: Dashboard frontend or backend is not reachable.
The requested page does not show the market, entries, exits, order lifecycle, or comparison needed for the decision.

evidencePolicy: Dashboard links support visual review but do not replace artifact evidence.
Screenshots or explicit screenshot skip reasons are required for promotion claims.
The generic Agent Dashboard links to this; it does not reimplement strategy charts.
notes: Use links as evidence refs from role reports and decisions.
